title: Nailing the USD high with Multi Agent Systems
author: fibspeak
selftext:
A few post ago here I explained my merit ranked bias indicator. 

[https://www.reddit.com/r/ai\_trading/comments/1tmdo4k/multi\_agent\_sentiment\_tool\_grounded\_in\_real/](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading/comments/1tmdo4k/multi_agent_sentiment_tool_grounded_in_real/)

  
Through the last hours over various different AI profiles multiple longs on XXXUSD pairs were taking, spiking the short USD sentiment. 

  
A while later the move came.

comments.author: fibspeak
comments.body: sentiment switching back to bearish eurusd at 1.1580

comments.author: Sure-Masterpiece4650
comments.body: how'd it handle the whipsaw before the actual move

replies.author: fibspeak
replies.body:
some of the bias was generated just from profit taking as we hit targets on the downside and this lightened the bear bias in xxxusd. 

then new longs started to come in from my "contrarian" profile and some of the longer term ones. contrarian took some initial stop outs in gbpusd and eurusd (not audusd which didnt spike down). the swing trades were largely unaffected with the move being contained to within 20 pips. 

then my scalping and quant profiles fired after the first pop and retracement to trade the follow through move.
